jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.
freshAuditPolicy.completionAuditDetail: When the current checklist is completed, run a broad detailed audit like the 2026-05-30 manual review: backend/API, frontend/UI, permissions, production behavior, performance/data scale, tests, deployment, logs, navigation, accessibility, and real user journeys; update remediation-backlog.md before continuing.

lastHealthyBaseline.tests: Storage direct-access URL hardening regressions passed 30/30
lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws restarted active; /api/status healthy; /storage and /files returned 307; /api/storage/direct-access, /api/storage/sftp-sync, and /api/storage/nodes returned 401; recent service logs clean

lastRun.target: P3 management-configured Direct Access URL hardening
lastRun.summary: Storage Direct Access public base URLs are now validated before create/edit persistence and normalized before DB writes; older unsafe stored URLs fail closed in the signed direct-access route instead of redirecting operators/browsers to localhost, private/special IPs, credentialed URLs, or non-HTTP(S) schemes.
validation: production baseline before work: vcontrolhub-next.service, vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service, and caddy.service active; /api/status healthy; route probes returned 307/401/200 without 500; recent logs clean; local HEAD matched origin/main
static audit found no client-only protected page wrappers, no remaining internal <a href="/ routes, and no production confirm/prompt/reload calls outside tests
npx vitest run src/lib/storage/__tests__/schema.test.ts src/lib/storage/__tests__/service.test.ts src/app/api/storage/direct-access/__tests__/route.test.ts passed 30/30
npm run lint passed with existing react-hooks/set-state-in-effect warnings
production services vcontrolhub-next.service and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service restarted and active
recent production logs checked; no new error/warn entries
lastRun.deployment: Restarted vcontrolhub-next.service and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service successfully; smoke test passed; functional code committed as 3ee3667 and pushed before this bookkeeping update.
lastRun.nextTarget: Run the required comprehensive fresh audit because the current backlog is now effectively complete and the success counter exceeded the configured threshold. One carried item remains: P1 taskify or add progress/timeout/cancel UX for long-running SFTP storage sync/import work.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
